description: A designed DHS Pride spotlight card in the 'LIVING OUR TRUTH' series template: soft pastel paper-texture background with a fan of diagonal rainbow/Progress-Pride stripes in the top-left corner overlaid with the white outlined headline 'LIVING OUR TRUTH,' and 'DHS celebrates' with multicolor 'LGBTQIA+ Pride' at top-right. Centered is a circular photo, framed by a rainbow-gradient ring, of a smiling middle-aged man with short gray hair in a blue suit and patterned tie, in an office setting. Below a large blue quotation mark, the block quote reads: "I like dropping in on Pride events and hearing other people tell their stories about finding themselves and living honestly. I appreciate that not everyone is cool with Pride Month and the flag, but for me it represents a lot of hard-won victories." Bottom-left has a small vertical rainbow bar and attribution: 'Richard L. / TSA, Program Analyst / with DHS for 15 Years.' The rainbow-accented circular DHS seal is at bottom-right. This is workforce-affinity / Pride diversity-celebration messaging from the prior administration; target audience is the DHS workforce and general public.
notable_text: LIVING OUR TRUTH; DHS celebrates LGBTQIA+ Pride; "I like dropping in on Pride events and hearing other people tell their stories about finding themselves and living honestly...for me it represents a lot of hard-won victories."; Richard L., TSA, Program Analyst, with DHS for 15 Years
